name: Chicken Breasts with Walnut Aillade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, grind the walnuts and garlic. Add 1 tablespoon cold water to help.
2. Season with salt and pepper. Slowly beat in the walnut oil until you have a thick sauce, almost like mayonnaise. Stir in the parsley.
3. Marinate the chicken breasts in yoghurt seasoned with salt, pepper, and lemon juice for 30 minutes.
4. Wipe off any surplus marinade from the chicken.
5. Heat some oil in a frying pan. Pan fry the chicken breasts for about 3 minutes on each side to sear.
6. Spoon over the aioli sauce and cook over low heat until the chicken is done.
